title: Childhood
questions: What is your earliest memory? How old were you at the time?
Can you describe your happiest memories of childhood?
Were you naughty as a child? What's the naughtiest thing you did?
How was your childhood different from that of your parents and grandparents?

Do you think that childhood is shorter these days than it was in the past? Do children grow up too fast nowadays? Do you think they become mature at a younger age than in the past? If so, what do you think are the implications of this - what are the advantages and disadvantages?

In the book by J.M. Barrie, the character Peter Pan never grew up. Do you think there is a part in all of us which never grows up or doesn't want to grow up? What are the advantages and disadvantages being 'young at heart'?
Do you think that children grow up too quickly nowadays?
